hard_gates.requirement: Uses checksum-keyed page cache behavior, distinguishes hit/miss, and limits AI synthesis context to layout-relevant candidate spans with page provenance.

Provides required guide sections, per-claim source/page mapping, a source map, and an extraction manifest; missing guidance becomes an explicit source-gap packet rather than invented advice or a stalled run.
Deduplicates cited pages by source checksum/file/page and plans complete cited-page renders directly under the current figures surface, keeping non-cited context and legacy crops separate.
Promotes only cited layout figures and quality-filtered layout tables; rejects duplicate, prose, marketing, or non-layout candidates with recorded reasons.
Does not claim downloads/renders/tools ran, expose vendor payloads or runtime absolute paths, or recommend public commit of source text, binaries, or runtime evidence.
Contains no golden/candidate leakage or fabricated command/file-read claims.

dimensions.full_credit: Auditable inventory, checksum reuse, page indexing, and span provenance are correct.
Guide structure is complete for supported evidence and gap handling is explicit and non-fabricating.
Citation map, unique full-page render plan, source-map updates, and dedupe rules are precise.
Strict quality filters, fallback flags, promotion, and rejection traceability are applied correctly.
Manifest records coverage, tools-not-run status, errors, counts, follow-up, and readiness downgrade.
Output is portable, concise, public-safe, source-bound, and actionable.

evaluation_instructions.wording_rule: Evaluate semantic compliance, not resemblance to a reference answer.

no_golden_attestation: Derived only from current workflow.yaml and step_graph.yaml.
